title: sida rhombifolia var. microphylla
intro: Sida rhombifolia var. microphylla, also known as the small-leaf sida, is a variety of the Sida rhombifolia plant, a flowering plant in the Malvaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Sida rhombifolia var. microphylla include its ability to aid in reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory congestion, and promoting a healthy immune system. Herbal preparations of Sida rhombifolia var. microphylla include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis and pneumonia.
